title: Request: Transform any module that is specified in a way like this:  --top-module <module-name>

features.name: multi_level_module_hierarchy_instantiation
features.description: Code should include multiple modules with hierarchical instantiation where a submodule is instantiated by an intermediate module
features.snippet:
module top(); A inst_a(); endmodule
module A(); B inst_b(); endmodule
module B(); endmodule

features.name: top_module_option_on_submodule
features.description: Code should include a module hierarchy where the user attempts to use --top-module flag on a non-top level module
features.snippet:
module top(); A inst_a(); endmodule
module A(); B inst_b(); endmodule
module B(); endmodule
// User runs: verilator --top-module B design.v
